items.a: Yes — in the US, Futures Church is a registered 501(c)(3). In Australia, giving is through Futures Church Inc. You’ll receive a receipt by email immediately and a consolidated statement every January.

items.q: Can I give in another currency?
items.a: Yes. We accept AUD, USD, IDR and most major cards. Your bank may convert — we don’t charge a FX fee.

items.q: What’s the difference between tithe and offering?
items.a: Tithe is the first 10% — a covenant rhythm of worship. Offering is everything beyond. Both are worship; both matter.

items.q: Can I stop my recurring gift?
items.a: Anytime. Reply to any receipt email or email finance@futures.church and we’ll cancel the same day.

items.q: Where does the money actually go?
items.a: Scroll up to Transparency — we publish the allocation in plain numbers. Our annual audited report is also available on request.

items.q: Can I give stock, crypto, or property?
items.a: Yes. Email finance@futures.church and our team will walk you through it — no pressure, all options open.
